title: Display Delight
description: Allows to place every food item in Farmer's Delight in 3D
body:
# Placeable 3D Foods!

This addon lets you place EVERY food item in Farmer's Delight(and other addons) in 3D! 

[>>Fabric port ](https://modrinth.com/mod/display-delight-fabric)

![foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yXepZhp8/images/4dbf807977b25827e4fc6b7cf10571e0541b7751.png)

For foods already in containers (bowls, glass bottles, etc.), simply Sneak + Right-click to place them directly on the ground.

All placed food blocks are neither block entities nor entities, which makes them lag-friendly when placed in large amounts. 

### New Items: Food Plates
Crafted using any wooden slab, plates allow you to display smaller finger foods that don't come in a container.
Some finger foods in the larger plates are stackable. (maximum stack size varies)


![Food plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7542dc8af22ff58f94da384b96fe754436215d4_0.webp) 

### Plate Interactions 
- Place All Items: Sneak + Right-click with the food.
- Take One Item: Right-click with an empty hand.
- Take All Items: Sneak + Right-click with an empty hand.
### Hiding/showing plates
- Hide the plate: Right-click it with any Axe.
- Show the plate again: Right-click it with a right Food Plate item.
### Obtaining Food Block Items in Survival
- Silk Touch: Mine placed foods to drop them as items. (Note: Plated foods must be at maximum stack capacity to drop).
- Wandering Traders: They sell food block items, prioritizing items from add-ons you don't have installed. This is the only way to obtain those specific food blocks in survival


## Compatible Addons

--- 

- Corn delight - 8 foods
- Expanded Delight - 37 foods
- Delightful - 22 foods
- Pineapple Delight - 6 foods
- Ocean's Delight - 9 foods
- Alex's Delight - 8 foods
- Cultural Delights - 25 foods
- Large Meals - 13 foods
- Festive Delight - 3 foods
-  8 foods from Brewin' and Chewin'
-  15 foods from End's Delight
-  17 foods from Ender's Delight
-  15 foods from Crabber's Delight
-  18 foods from Aquaculture Delight
-  37 foods from My Nether's Delight
-  8 foods from Nether's Delight
- Abnormals Delight - 22 foods
- Miner's Delight+ - 12 foods
- Farmer's Respite - 14 foods
